user.title: SmartESS Local Connection
user.description: Configure the local server that the EyeBond WiFi collector will connect to.

data.server_ip: Server IP address (reachable from collector subnet)
data.udp_broadcast_ip: UDP broadcast (subnet, e.g. x.x.x.255, or logger IP if broadcast blocked)
data.inverter_count: Number of inverters on RS485 bus

abort.already_configured: This server:port combination is already configured.

init.title: Polling Intervals
init.description: Configure how often each group of commands is polled. Values in seconds. Set to 0 to disable a group.

data.inverter_count: Number of inverters on RS485 bus
